title: eschscholzia frutescens
intro: Eschscholzia frutescens, also known as California poppy, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, due to its alkaloid content, specifically eschscholtzine. The health benefits of this plant include relief from insomnia, anxiety, and restlessness, as well as pain relief and muscle relaxation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or capsules, and is also used topically in ointments and salves for skin and muscle issues.
